title: Train-Test Split
content_md:
# Train-Test Split

Splits data into training and evaluation sets.

```python
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.2)
```

questions.question: Why do we split data?
questions.answer: To test model performance on unseen data.

questions.question: What is overfitting?
questions.answer: When a model memorizes the training data instead of learning patterns.
